Base Command

Input
name: cuckoo-list-tasks

outputs.description: Category of task Cuckoo.Task.Machine Machine of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Category

outputs.description: Errors of task Cuckoo.Task.Target Target of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Errors

outputs.description: Package of task Cuckoo.Task.SampleID Sample ID of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Package

outputs.description: Task guest Cuckoo.Task.Custom Custom values of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Guest

outputs.description: Task owner Cuckoo.Task.Priority Priority of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Owner

outputs.description: Platform of task Cuckoo.Task.Options Task options
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Platform

outputs.description: Task status Cuckoo.Task.EnforceTimeout Is timeout of task enforced
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Status

outputs.description: Task tags Cuckoo.Task.ID ID of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Tags

outputs.description: Date the task was added Cuckoo.Task.CompletedOn Date the task was completed
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.AddedOn
